Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC) helps you manage who has access to Azure resources, what they can do with those resources, and what areas they have access to. Azure RBAC is an authorization system built onAzure Resource Managerthat provides fine-grained access management to Azure resources. This video provides a quick overview of Azure RBAC.

description: Learn how to transfer an Azure subscription and known related resources to a different Microsoft Entra directory.
summary: Organizations might have several Azure subscriptions. Each subscription is associated with a particular Microsoft Entra directory. To make management easier, you might want to transfer a subscription to a different Microsoft Entra directory. When you transfer a subscription to a different Microsoft Entra directory, some resources aren't transferred to the target directory. For example, all role assignments and custom roles in Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC) arepermanentlydeleted fro
classification_reason: Subscription transfer impacts Azure RBAC objects (role assignments, custom roles) in a product-specific way. The page documents exactly which security-related resources are deleted or not transferred, which is detailed, product-specific RBAC/Entra behavior that functions as expert security configuration knowledge.

title: Troubleshoot Azure RBAC limits - Azure RBAC
display_title: Resolve Azure RBAC role assignment and custom role limits
description: Learn how to use Azure Resource Graph to reduce the number of Azure role assignments and Azure custom roles in Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC).
summary: This article describes some common solutions when you exceed the limits in Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC).
classification_reason: Focuses on exceeding Azure RBAC limits and how to remediate using Azure Resource Graph. While it references limits, the core is how to diagnose and fix over-limit conditions, which matches troubleshooting (symptom of hitting limits → diagnosis → solution).

title: Tutorial: Create an Azure custom role with Azure CLI - Azure RBAC

For this tutorial, you create a custom role named Reader Support Tickets using Azure CLI.
